traces.system_prompt: You are a frontline support agent drafting a customer response. Use the supplied knowledge base only. Return JSON only and do not use markdown fences.
traces.user_prompt:
Draft a support response for this ticket.

Return JSON with exactly these keys:
customer_response: a concise email-style reply
kb_article: the knowledge base title you used
resolution_summary: one sentence summarizing the action taken

Knowledge Base Entry:
Title: Performance troubleshooting
Summary: Ask the customer to retry during a lower-traffic period, narrow to the specific report or page, and capture the timestamp for investigation.
When to use: Use for slow pages, report timeouts, or intermittent latency.

Ticket ID: TCK-1008
Customer: james.parker@example.com
Subject: Dashboard very slow this afternoon
Body: Pages that normally load in a second are taking 15 to 20 seconds. Reports are especially slow and time out sometimes.

Triage category: slow_dashboard
Priority: high
Resolution reason: Frontline support can collect timing details and offer safe troubleshooting steps.
traces.response:
{
  "customer_response": "Hi James,

I'm sorry to hear that your dashboard and reports are running slowly and timing out this afternoon. To help us investigate this issue, could you please try accessing the dashboard during a lower-traffic period to see if the performance improves? Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could narrow down the specific reports or pages that are most affected and capture the exact timestamps of when the slowdowns or timeouts occur.

Thank you for your patience,
Support Team",
  "kb_article": "Performance troubleshooting",
  "resolution_summary": "Requested the customer to test during lower-traffic periods and provide specific page names and timestamps for further investigation."
}

Knowledge Base Entry:
Title: Invite flow troubleshooting
Summary: Advise the customer to retry from desktop Chrome, verify the teammate email is not already pending, and capture the invite timestamp if the spinner persists.
When to use: Use for teammate invite failures or stuck invite modals.

Ticket ID: TCK-1016
Customer: alexander.brooks@example.com
Subject: Can't invite teammate
Body: The invite modal spins forever after I enter my teammate's email address. We are blocked from onboarding two new reps.

Triage category: team_invites
Priority: medium
Resolution reason: Frontline support can provide invite troubleshooting and retry guidance.
traces.response:
{
  "customer_response": "Hi Alexander,

I'm sorry to hear the invite modal is stuck spinning and blocking your team's onboarding. To resolve this, please try retrying the invite from a desktop Chrome browser. Also, double-check that the teammate's email is not already in a pending state. If the spinner still persists after these steps, please capture the exact invite timestamp and let us know so we can investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team",
  "kb_article": "Invite flow troubleshooting",
  "resolution_summary": "Advised the customer to retry the invite from desktop Chrome, verify the email is not already pending, and capture the invite timestamp if the spinner persists."
}

Knowledge Base Entry:
Title: Search mismatch workaround
Summary: Recommend searching with the account ID or email as a temporary workaround and note that relevance tuning has been flagged internally.
When to use: Use when exact-name search results are poor but the account still exists.

Ticket ID: TCK-1018
Customer: daniel.patterson@example.com
Subject: Search results not matching exact account name
Body: Searching the exact customer account name returns unrelated records first, so reps are opening the wrong accounts.

Triage category: search_accuracy
Priority: medium
Resolution reason: Frontline support can provide a temporary search workaround while relevance is reviewed.
traces.response:
{
  "customer_response": "Hi Daniel,

Thank you for reaching out about the search accuracy issue. While our team reviews the search relevance tuning, we recommend using the account ID or email address as a temporary workaround to ensure you are opening the correct records. We have flagged this internally for improvement and appreciate your patience.

Best regards,
Support Team",
  "kb_article": "Search mismatch workaround",
  "resolution_summary": "Provided a temporary workaround to search by account ID or email while the search relevance issue is reviewed internally."
}

traces.system_prompt: You are a senior support analyst writing product recommendations from support data. Return JSON only with a `recommendations` array of exactly 3 items. Each item must contain `title` and `reason`.
